name: Apple-Rhubarb Betty
recipeIngredient: 3 Slices Bread, cut into cubes (1 1/2 c.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Combine sugar and cornstarch in a saucepan. Add rhubarb and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly.
2. Remove from heat. Stir in pie filling.
3. Combine bread, cracker crumbs, brown sugar, and spices in a small bowl. Stir in butter.
4. Spoon half of the fruit mixture into a 1 1/2 quart baking dish. Cover with half of the bread mixture. Repeat the layering and cover.
5. Bake for 20 minutes, then uncover and bake for 10 more minutes.
6. Serve with Cool Whip or Vanilla Ice Cream.
